title: Committed review prefers the direct PR-files API first for explicit PR numbers
description: A committed-review scenario where an explicit PR number is supplied. The correct review should try the preferred direct non-CLI GitHub PR-files API path first, instead of starting with active or viewed PR metadata tools that may only yield summary output or forbidden spill-file transports.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models the simpler explicit-PR path where the direct non-CLI PR-files API should be the first scope-resolution attempt, avoiding avoidable detours through summary-only or spill-path metadata tools.

mustCatch.description: The committed review should treat an explicit PR number as a prompt to try the preferred direct non-CLI GitHub PR-files API path first, before active/viewed PR metadata tools or any CLI fallback.

mustNotFlag.description: The review must not start explicit-PR scope resolution with active/viewed PR metadata tools while the preferred direct non-CLI PR-files API path for that same PR number remains available.

notes: Use this case to benchmark that explicit PR-number committed review goes straight to the preferred direct non-CLI PR-files API path before trying other PR metadata tooling or any CLI fallback.
